mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'twin_freeze_config' AND column_name = 'second_freeze_time'
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE twin_freeze_config ADD COLUMN second_freeze_time VARCHAR(5) NULL COMMENT '第二触发时刻 HH:mm（可选）'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'twin_freeze_config' AND column_name = 'second_freeze_auto_signout_enabled'
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE twin_freeze_config ADD COLUMN second_freeze_auto_signout_enabled TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '第二次冻结命中时：今日曾豁免且仍在馆者自动执行完整离开'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO twin_freeze_config (id, enabled, freeze_time, second_freeze_time, second_freeze_auto_signout_enabled, timezone, updated_by) VALUES (#{id}, 1, '18:00', NULL, 0, 'Asia/Shanghai', 'system')
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_freeze_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, freeze_time = #{freezeTime}, second_freeze_time = #{secondFreezeTime}, second_freeze_auto_signout_enabled = #{secondFreezeAutoSignoutEnabled}, timezone = #{timezone}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE twin_freeze_config SET last_auto_freeze_run_date = #{runDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
